_notes: Source: iit-proj-patient (clinical research, de-identified). Target: R4 base patient (unconstrained). All drifts are relaxations from a constrained research profile back to the R4 base: bans are lifted, mandatory elements become optional, research extensions removed.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [iit-pat-1 (error: Research patient must have a study identifier), iit-pat-2 (warning: Deceased patients should have a deceased date)]. R4 base has no custom root constraints.
Mandatory extension studyEnrollmentDate[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target (R4 base has no extension constraints).
Mandatory extension consentStatus[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension studyArm[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension dataUseRestriction[0..* mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Source extension slicing removed in target: source defines slices [studyEnrollmentDate, consentStatus, studyArm, dataUseRestriction]; R4 base has no extension slicing.
identifier cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased.
Identifier slicing removed in target: source has named slices [studyId[1..1], siteId[0..1]]; R4 base has no identifier slicing.
Source mandatory slice studyId[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target (R4 base has no named identifier slices).
Source optional slice siteId[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target.
active cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base).
name cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..*] (R4 base). Ban removed in R4 base.
gender cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased.
birthDate cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased.
deceased[x] MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true types=[boolean, dateTime]; target mustSupport=false, same types as R4 base).
address cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Ban removed.
photo cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..*] (R4 base). Ban removed.
communication MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
communication.language MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false). Both have min=1 (required element) inherited from R4 base.

communication.language binding strength weakened: source extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages) → target preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages). Same value set, strength weakened from extensible to preferred.
generalPractitioner cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..*] (R4 base). Ban removed.
Reference target removed in target: source constrains to iit-proj/Organization; R4 base has no target profile constraint on managingOrganization.
MustSupport removed on managingOrganization (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
